headlines.title: Canada Eyes Two New Oil Pipelines
headlines.summary: The governments of Canada and Alberta signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) on a West Coast oil pipeline on Nov. 27, 2025. headlines.title: Russia Bans Diesel Exports Amid Heavy Ukraine Attacks On Refineries
headlines.summary: Russia has officially banned all diesel exports in a bid to secure its domestic fuel market following highly destructive Ukrainian drone strikes on its energy infrastructure. headlines.title: UK Airline Turns Fuel Price Surge Into $500 Million Windfall Through Hedging
headlines.summary: Jet2 recorded a nearly £400m boost from the rising price of jet fuel which caused widespread fear that summer holidays could be cancelled and airlines could go bust. headlines.title: Oil Prices Jump over 7% as Iran Ceasefire Declared ‘Over’
headlines.summary: Oil prices surged over 7% to a two-week high on Wednesday after U.S. President Donald Trump declared that the interim ceasefire agreement with Iran is officially over and dismissed the recently signed memorandum of understanding as a "waste of time." headlines.title: EIA: Crude Oil Inventories in US See Rare Build
headlines.summary: Crude oil inventories in the United States saw a surprise increase of 3.0 million barrels during the week ending July 3, according to new data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) released on Wednesday.
